pull.title: guix: use a temporary file over sponge, drop moreutils

events.body: The following sections might be updated with supplementary metadata relevant to reviewers and maintainers. ### Reviews See [the guideline](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#code-review) for information on the review process. | Type | Reviewers | | ---- | --------- | | ACK | [davidgumberg](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34627#issuecomment-3946084838), [janb84](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34627#pullrequestreview-3843523533), [sedited](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34627#pullrequestreview-3850196916) | If your review is incorrectly listed, please copy-paste <!--meta-tag:bot-skip--> into the comment that the bot should ignore. ### Conflicts Reviewers, this pull request conflicts with the following ones: * [#32764](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/32764) (guix: Build for macOS using Clang only by hebasto) * [#25573](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/25573) (guix: produce a `-static-pie` bitcoind by fanquake) If you consider this pull request important, please also help to review the conflicting pull requests. Ideally, start with the one that should be merged first.
Concept ACK, deletes a guix dependency

crACK c86bce597a3c4d45f7c2b6149197d8303bda0e87

Drops moreutils in favor of temp files, with the super small risk of some file system pollution on error.  But this risk is negated  because the file disappears when the Guix container exits. lgtm ! nice find. 

**Host architecture:** `aarch64`
**Commit:** `c86bce597a3c`

comments.diff_hunk:
@@ -401,11 +401,13 @@ mv --no-target-directory "$OUTDIR" "$ACTUAL_OUTDIR" \
 
 (
     cd /outdir-base
+    tmp="$(mktemp "${ACTUAL_OUTDIR}/tmp.XXX")"
     {
         echo "$GIT_ARCHIVE"
-        find "$ACTUAL_OUTDIR" -type f
+        find "$ACTUAL_OUTDIR" -type f -not -name "tmp.*"
     } | xargs realpath --relative-base="$PWD" \
-      | xargs sha256sum \
-      | sort -k2 \
-      | sponge "$ACTUAL_OUTDIR"/SHA256SUMS.part
+        | xargs sha256sum \
+        | sort -k2 \
+        > "$tmp";
+    mv "$tmp" "$ACTUAL_OUTDIR"/SHA256SUMS.part
comments.body:
Could be simplified I think by creating a tmp directory outside of `$ACTUAL_OUTDIR`

```bash
    tmp="$(mktemp)"
    {
        echo "$GIT_ARCHIVE"
        find "$ACTUAL_OUTDIR" -type f
    } | xargs realpath --relative-base="$PWD" \
        | xargs sha256sum \
        | sort -k2 \
        > "$tmp";
    mv "$tmp" "$ACTUAL_OUTDIR"/SHA256SUMS.part
```

     } | xargs realpath --relative-base="$PWD" \

+        | xargs sha256sum \

+    mv "$tmp" "$ACTUAL_OUTDIR"/SHA256SUMS.part
